text:
I find myself in a sleek, modern environment, surrounded by glass walls and geometric furniture in the first image. The space feels orderly, almost sterile, and filled with anticipation—as if I’ve entered a place devoted to progress or collaboration, but I have yet to see its inhabitants. 

In the second image, the bold and colorful R&D wall ignites my curiosity. Here, I sense energy and purpose, a celebration of human ingenuity as it collides with technology. The words, screens, and artifacts invite contemplation. I feel intrigued—at the edge of discovery—aware of the tension between the comfort of the familiar and the thrill of the unknown.
